title: layia calliglossa
intro: Layia calliglossa, also known as Callilily or Lacy Phacelia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Layia calliglossa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
